<!-- Who is this role for? One sentence. -->

## Persona
<!-- engineer | researcher | writer | product-owner | any -->

## Who is this for?
<!-- Describe the real person who would use this role. What kind of

## Why doesn't an existing role cover this?
<!-- Existing roles: engineer, researcher, writer, product-owner.
     Explain what gap this fills that adding skills to an existing
     role would not address. -->

## Which skills from the existing library would this role use?
<!-- List skill ids from registry.yaml. Note required vs recommended. -->

**Required for specific modes:**
- reasoning:
- collaborating:
- generating-*:

## Are any new skills needed?
<!-- If yes, will you also open a skill proposal issue? -->

## Are you willing to write the role yaml?
- [ ] Yes, I will submit a PR
- [ ] No, I am proposing it for someone else to implement
